mapper.select: SELECT id, community_id, total_spaces, reserved_spaces, visitor_quota_hours, visitor_single_duration_hours, visitor_activation_window_hours, zombie_vehicle_threshold_days, version, create_time, update_time FROM parking_config WHERE community_id = #{communityId}
mapper.update: UPDATE parking_config SET total_spaces = #{totalSpaces}, reserved_spaces = #{reservedSpaces}, visitor_quota_hours = #{visitorQuotaHours}, visitor_single_duration_hours = #{visitorSingleDurationHours}, visitor_activation_window_hours = #{visitorActivationWindowHours}, zombie_vehicle_threshold_days = #{zombieVehicleThresholdDays}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_car_plate WHERE community_id = #{communityId} AND status IN ('normal', 'primary') AND is_deleted = 0
